title: HY HCI Group Presents Five Papers at ACM CHI 2026, Barcelona
author: Admin
content:
**Conference**: ACM CHI 2026 **Date**: April 13 – April 17, 2026 **Location**: Barcelona, Spain HY HCI Group had a strong presence at ACM CHI 2026, presenting five full papers.
## Presented Papers Adaptive Worker Assistance in Smart Factories via Real-Time Gaze and Context Inference — Best Paper Award
Designing Trust Calibration Interfaces for Human-AI Teaming — Honorable Mention
Multimodal Intent Recognition for Collaborative Robots on the Factory Floor
AR-Guided Assembly: Reducing Cognitive Load with Spatial Instruction Overlays
Worker Fatigue Estimation from Multimodal Wearable Signals
summary:
